series_metadata.series_description: File contains the application, test results, correspondence, annual renewals, proof of liability insurance, litigation and other support documents required for those individuals and companies to be licensed. License types include exhibitors, hotel/motels, underground storage tank (UST) installers, UST inspectors, reduced ignition propensity cigarettes (RIPC), storage of explosives, and fire protection equipment certification.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until converted to machine readable format. Upon confirmation that machine readable format has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy paper copy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm for four years after date created, then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain records ten years after expiration of the last one-year licensure term, then delete, unless litigation has been instituted. If litigation has been instituted, records for that licensee shall be maintained for fifteen years after the date the litigation terminates, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
